title: 10-in-1 Universal Multifunctional USB Charging Cable – Multi-Adapter Multi-Device Charger for Smartphones, Tablets, Portable Gaming Devices, Digital Cameras & More
features: 【10 in 1 Universal Multifunctional USB】Multi-Charger Hub – Simplify your power setup with a single USB-A cable delivering ten distinct connectors. Effortlessly switch between device tips for smartphones, tablets, MP3 players and more without swapping cables.

【Portable All-In-One Charging Solution】Ditch bulky adapters: this compact, lightweight design fits into any travel pouch or work bag. Ready for business trips or daily commutes, the 10 in 1 Universal Multifunctional USB cable keeps all your gadgets powered with one handy tether.

【Broad Device Coverage】From smartphones and tablets to gaming handhelds and digital cameras, the 10 in 1 Universal Multifunctional USB cable handles every USB-A charge port. Perfect for USB power banks, car chargers, laptop USB ports or wall adapters—one cable for every charging scenario.

【Premium Durability & Safety】Built with heat-resistant alloy connectors and reinforced braided jacket, this 10 in 1 Universal Multifunctional USB cable resists bending and fraying. Integrated over-current protection and sturdy terminals ensure reliable, long-lasting performance.

【Efficient, Hassle-Free Charging】Experience rapid power delivery and zero cable clutter. The 10 in 1 Universal Multifunctional USB multi-connector design eliminates tangled cords while charging multiple gadgets sequentially. Enjoy seamless charging at home, office, or on the go.
description: Discover the power of one cable that does it all—our 10 in 1 Universal Multifunctional USB multi-charger hub transforms any USB-A port into a versatile charging station. Say goodbye to a tangle of cords and hello to effortless switching between connectors for your phone, tablet, MP3 player, handheld game console or digital camera in a flash. Toss it into your bag and hit the road without the bulk of extra adapters—whether you’re jetting off for business or just heading into the office, you’ll have every tip you need tucked into a slim, lightweight braid that resists wear and tear. Inside, premium alloy connectors and built-in protection guard against overheating and power surges so you can charge with confidence. Plug into your laptop’s USB port, wall charger, car adapter or power bank and enjoy fast, reliable power delivery wherever life takes you. Simplify your setup, ditch the clutter and keep every gadget juiced up with this all-in-one charging solution—no swapping, no fuss, just one cable that really does everything.

specifications_table.Compatible Phone Models: Compatible with smartphones, specific models not listed
